name: Chicken Breasts Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whipping cream, or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken with flour.
2. Mix eggs, water, Romano cheese, parsley, and salt.
3. Dip chicken pieces in egg mixture, then into bread crumbs.
4. Heat butter and oil in a large skillet.
5. Cook chicken breasts over medium heat until browned about 15 minutes.
6. Remove chicken to a baking dish, 11-1/2 x 7-1/2 inches.
7. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
8. Make cheese sauce: Heat cream, water, and butter in a saucepan over medium heat until butter melts. Add cheese; cook and stir for 5 minutes. Stir in parsley.
9. Pour cheese sauce over chicken.
10. Top each piece with a slice of cheese.
11. Bake until cheese melts and chicken is tender, about 8 minutes.
ANN'S NOTES: I used 6 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves and substituted evaporated milk for the cream. This recipe is excellent for company. It works well with evaporated milk.
